title: hieracium schmidtii subsp. samothracis
intro: Hieracium schmidtii subsp. samothracis, also known as Hieracium samothracum, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium schmidtii subsp. samothracis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
